name: passing both a registry file and a consumer config is rejected as a usage error naming the exclusivity
command: OUT=/tmp/cl564-r63-$$; mkdir -p $OUT && printf 'sources: []\n' > $OUT/reg.yaml && printf 'extends: [standard]\n' > $OUT/ctp.config.yaml && cd $OUT && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-refresh.sh" --registry $OUT/reg.yaml --config $OUT/ctp.config.yaml 2>e.err; rc=$?; [ $rc -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'mutually exclusive' e.err && echo registry-config-exclusive 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
